story_arceus_10_07000/2401_1001_0200_10:
Well... I suppose I am a bit worried about
this being the actual show.
story_arceus_10_07000/2401_1001_0300_10: But strangely, I’m also looking forward to it!
story_arceus_10_07000/2401_1001_0400_10:
To be so excited for your first stage
performance... You truly are incredible.
story_arceus_10_07000/2401_1001_0500_10:
Your first step onstage is something you’ll
only experience once.
story_arceus_10_07000/2401_1001_0600_10:
Don’t get caught up in pleasing the
audience. Just enjoy the play!
story_arceus_10_07000/2401_1001_0700_10: I will. Thank you very much.
story_arceus_10_07000/2401_1001_0800_10:
I’ll take all you’ve taught me to heart and
give a performance that could only come
from me.
